titleStmt.title: SII 39.137: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 137. (A.R. No. 137 of 1916.) MĒLŪR, PONNERI TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. SUGANDAPURTĪŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE NORTH, WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN VIJAYAGAṆḌAGŌPALA DĒVA 32ND YEAR. 13TH CENTURY A.D. (1282 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to the gift of 100 paṇam to the Śivabrāhmaṇa Sēnāpati and Nārpatteṉṉāyira-baṭṭar for worshipping and offerings to the image of Tiruppālaivaṉamuḍaiya-nāyaṉār installed by Sirukumūr-uḍaiyāṇ-Tulaiyāda-selvaṉ in the temple Tirumaṇaṅgāvuḍaiya nāyaṇārkōyil at Vallūr in Nāyaṟunāḍu, a sub-division of Puḻalkōṭṭam alias Vikramachōḻa vaḷanāḍu in Jayagoṇḍachōḻamaṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvanac cakravatti
kaḷ śrīvijayakaṇṭakopāla tevaṟku
yāṇṭu 3 10 2 vatu Iṣabha nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu
saptamiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pū
cattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu pu
ḻal koṭṭamāṉa vikramacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu
nāyaṟu nāṭṭu vallūr Uṭaiyār tirumaṇaṅ
kāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil ciṟukumur U
ṭaiyāṉ tulaiyāta celvaṉ pratiṣṭhitta
tiruppālaivaṉam Uṭaiya nāyaṉār Ivvūrc ci
ru muruṭaiyāṉ tiruppālaivaṉamuṭaiyāṉ tulai
yāta celvaṉ candrātittavarai celluvatāka Iṉṉā
yiṉārkkup pūcai Amutupaṭikku nāḷ Oṉṟukku
niccayitta I mūn_ṛumā Iṉnelluk kuṟuṇṇikkum I
ṉṉayiṉār koyil civappirāmaṇar bharadvāci
yagotrattuc ceṉāpatipaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum
kaucika kotrattu nāṟpatteṇṇāyira paṭṭa
ṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum Ivvaṉaivarom Ittiruppā
laivaṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkkup pūcai Amutu pa
ṭikku nāḷ 4 kku Ivar niccayitta nelluk kuṟu
ṇṇiyum candrādittavarai naṭattakkaṭavomāka I
var pakkal kaikkoṇṭa Aṉṉāṭu naṭakkum naṟ
ø 100 Ippaṇam nūṟumk koṇṭu Innāyaṉārai
ppūcikka kaṭava civabrāmaṇar muṉniṉṟār O
ruvar naṭattak kaṭavomākak kalveṭṭik ku
ṭuttom Ikkoyilk kāṇi Uṭaiya civa
brāmaṇar Ippaṭi cammatittu Ippaṇam nūṟum
kaik koṇṭu kalveṭṭik kuṭutto
m Ivvaṉaivarom śrī māheśvara ra
kṣai §
Digital edition of SII 39.137 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
